name: finsight-demo-corpus
description: 演示用财报/宏观公告片段（模拟截至 2026-06-04 可获得的披露），供 Supabase pgvector 检索

documents.content: Apple Inc. (AAPL) FY2025 (fiscal year ended Sep 2025, 10-K filed Feb 2026): Revenue $416.2B (+6.4% YoY), Gross Margin 46.8%, Operating Margin 32.1%, EPS $7.08. Services revenue $109.5B (+14% YoY). iPhone revenue $208.4B. R&D $34.0B. Management cites on-device AI features and India supply diversification.

Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) FY2025 (year ended Jun 2025, 10-K filed Aug 2025): Revenue $281.7B (+15% YoY). Intelligent Cloud $137.4B (+22% YoY). Operating income $128.5B. Commercial cloud gross margin 71%. Copilot seat expansion in Enterprise; AI datacenter CapEx remains elevated with ROI tracked per workload.

NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) Q1 FY2026 (quarter ended Apr 2026, earnings May 2026): Revenue $44.8B (+72% YoY), Data Center $39.1B. Gross margin 73.1%. Blackwell Ultra ramp; sovereign AI and hyperscaler capex pipelines disclosed. Networking +38% YoY on scale-out clusters.

Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) FY2025 (year ended Dec 2025, 10-K filed Feb 2026): Consolidated revenue $402.0B (+15% YoY). Google Cloud $58.0B (+32% YoY). Search resilient; YouTube ads +11%. CapEx $61.0B for TPU/GPU and datacenter build. Antitrust remedy compliance costs noted.

Amazon.com Inc. (AMZN) FY2025 (year ended Dec 2025, 10-K filed Feb 2026): Net sales $691.0B (+8% YoY). AWS $142.0B (+18% YoY) with operating margin expansion. Advertising $68.5B (+19% YoY). North America retail margin improved on regional fulfillment optimization.

Federal Reserve FOMC Summary (May 2026): Policy rate 3.75%-4.00% after two 25bp cuts YTD. Core PCE trending toward 2.3%. Unemployment 4.1%. Statement flags tariff pass-through uncertainty; dot plot shows one additional cut in 2026 H2. QT runoff continues at reduced pace.

JPMorgan Chase (JPM) Q1 2026: Net revenue $44.8B, Net income $14.6B. ROTCE 23%. IB fees +9% YoY. NII $24.0B; credit provisions $2.5B. CET1 15.9%. Management guides stable NII with modest loan growth; card delinquencies flat QoQ.

Tesla Inc. (TSLA) Q1 2026: Revenue $22.1B, Automotive gross margin 16.8% ex-credits. Deliveries 386k units in quarter. Energy storage deployments +31% YoY. Robotaxi pilot cities expanded; AI training capex guided up for FSD v13 stack.
